title: FRED Economic Data
description: Schema for data/fred-data.json — FRED series observations fetched by GitHub Actions.

updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last successful fetch (sentinel key — must be preserved).

series.description: Map of FRED series ID → series object. At least one series must be present.

name.description: Human-readable series name (must not be blank — Rule 6).

title.description: Optional verbose title; downstream code falls back to name when absent.

observations.description: Ordered list of date/value pairs. Must not be empty (Rule 7).

value.description: Observation value as a string (FRED API convention); may be '.' for missing.
